title: DIHYDROTRIAZINES AS POTETIAL ANTIMALARlALS
author: A. RAYCHAUDHURI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Several dihydrotriazines have been prepared from arylamines, possessing either antibacterial or antimalarial activity.
steps_raw: Several dihydrotriazines have been prepared from arylamines, possessing either antibacterial or antimalarial activity.
